generated_oml:
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for vehicle surroundings"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR sensor"
]

instance ClusteredObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud data after clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking, Iso23247DataTranslation
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component processing LiDAR data into structured object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Iso23247DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 compliant data translation component for serialization, message alignment, and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CloudComputingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based resource enabling offloading of ACC logic computations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time vehicle state visualization, projected driving path, detected object tracks, and data reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPath, DetectedObjectTracks, DataReporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service transferring ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides OffloadLeadVehicleDetection, OffloadSpeedCalculation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetSpeed, EmergencyBrake
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path of the vehicle based on current trajectory"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected objects with tracking information"
]

instance DataReporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive data reporting for monitoring and troubleshooting"
]

instance OffloadLeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading lead vehicle detection computation to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OffloadSpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading speed calculation based on distance to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting target speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrake : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activating emergency braking system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling sensor/actuator data and general automotive functions"
    base:contains LidarSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data processing and control mechanisms"
    base:contains Iso23247DataTranslation, CloudComputingEnabler, PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity for monitoring and control"
    base:contains VisualizationNode, ControlPanelNode
]

instance VisualizationNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for 3D vehicle state visualization"
]

instance ControlPanelNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for user control commands"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor actuation and steering servo are transmitted via ROS2 for intra-component communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication. The ISO 23247 Data Translation component handles serialization and unit conversions of control signals. Specific command formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, and conflict resolution mechanisms are not detailed in the provided documents."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular standards but constrained by hardware limitations; this latency ensures temporal alignment between physical and digital components during real-time operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 RA with entity-based structure; Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities are each deployed on separate hardware, implemented as ROS2 packages with nodes; deviations include Physical Twin Entity's expanded scope beyond ISO 23247's OME and Data Storage component lacking a corresponding FE."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 is used for communication between software components, while inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the ISO 23247 standard for Digital Twin framework for manufacturing, comprising four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The Reference architecture (Part 2) defines an entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Additionally, OPC Unified Architecture is referenced as an interoperability standard for implementing Functional Entities within the architecture."
]
